creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Oliver, hi Henry,

there hasn't been an update of this PR [1] for quite a while. Can you let
me know what the current state is? Can the problem still (not) be
reproduced? Should the PR be closed?

Regards,
Stefan

[1]: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=141775
